summary: Verified corrected Ganancia formula in /dashboard/realtime-metrics and /dashboard/historic-data endpoints. All 4 critical scenarios passed with exact math match: has_tax=True (total/1.19 - cost), has_tax=False (total - cost), positive profit case, and edit-sale recalculation. Backend formula correctly respects the 'Incluye IVA' checkbox.
passed: Sale create has_tax=True (total=60k, cost=10k, qty=6): delta utilidades = -9579.83 (matches expected (60000/1.19)-60000)
Sale create has_tax=False (total=60k, cost=10k, qty=6): delta utilidades = 0.00 (matches expected 60000-60000)
Sale create positive profit has_tax=True (total=100k, cost=10k, qty=5): delta utilidades = 34033.61 (matches expected (100000/1.19)-50000)
Edit sale has_tax True->False recalculates utilidades correctly (delta = 15966.39, matches expected)
notes: Frontend UI testing skipped: the change is purely backend computation in two metrics endpoints. Dashboard UI consumes these endpoints; visible values will reflect correct formula. Test data was created and cleaned up.
